_readme: Mod-pool gating for Random One Block. Vanilla (minecraft) is always enabled. starter_exceptions.enabled adds mod namespaces from day one (overrides force_disabled_mods). starter_exceptions.mods_with_minable_blocks catalogs every mod namespace in the master random block pool (regenerate after /randomblock reload when the mod list changes). force_disabled_mods blocks namespaces from the effective pool — do not put the same id in both force_disabled_mods and starter_exceptions.enabled (e.g. custom kubejs blocks need kubejs in enabled, not in force_disabled). Other mods unlock per team via FTB Quests (quest_unlock_map) or /randomblock poolenable.
